source_pr.title: tests: update `mysql-tester`, enable `table-lock` in integrationtest
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/45961

Problem Summary: update `mysql-tester`, set `enable-table-lock = true` in integrationtest and move 9 test cases.

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: fix unstable test | explain select * from pt1 order by a; (tests/integrationtest/r/planner/cascades/integration.result)
failure_signature: fix unstable test | explain select * from pt1 order by a; (tests/integrationtest/r/planner/cascades/integration.result)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: fix unstable test | explain select * from pt1 order by a; (tests/integrationtest/r/planner/cascades/integration.result).
fix_pattern: fix unstable test | explain select * from pt1 order by a; (tests/integrationtest/r/planner/cascades/integration.result)

evidence: evidence: fix unstable test | explain select * from pt1 order by a; (tests/integrationtest/r/planner/cascades/integration.result)
